_comment: CTA articulated (60-foot) bus vid ranges. Standard fleet (40-foot) is everything else. Sources: chicagobus.org/buses, chicagorailfan.com/rosctab.html (cross-checked 2026-04-29). The 4208-4299 gap is intentional — currently empty per both rosters. CTA has approved a 100-bus articulated order; when those arrive, add the new range here.
